general.name: General Options / Usability
general.scoring_note: 0 = not available, 1 = available but limited, 2 = fully available and functional

platform_operations.name: Close Alerts in SIEM
platform_operations.description: Can close alerts in all major SIEM solutions

platform_operations.name: Logging
platform_operations.description: Platform logging allows identification of all actions taken

platform_operations.name: Reasoning Logging
platform_operations.description: Reasoning steps are logged at sufficient detail

platform_operations.name: API Development
platform_operations.description: API is robust enough for integration with other security tools

platform_operations.name: Support Level
platform_operations.description: Support is responsive and allows for adequate issue resolution

platform_operations.name: Account Management
platform_operations.description: Account management is straightforward with SSO integration

platform_operations.name: Roles and Responsibility (RBAC)
platform_operations.description: Role-based access control with sufficient granularity

platform_operations.name: Native Chat Integration
platform_operations.description: Native integration with major communication platforms

platform_operations.name: Alerting
platform_operations.description: Automatic alerting on platform or analysis-level issues

platform_operations.name: Stats / Health Dashboards
platform_operations.description: Dashboards showing current platform status and performance

ai_specific.name: Bring Your Own Model
ai_specific.description: Ability to integrate custom models into the platform

ai_specific.name: Context Grounding
ai_specific.description: Ability to bring organizational data to feed into the model

ai_specific.name: Autonomous Action Thresholds
ai_specific.description: Platform allows setting confidence thresholds for autonomous execution

ai_specific.name: Investigation Audit Trail
ai_specific.description: Complete exportable record of every action with timestamps

ai_specific.name: IR Metrics Tracking
ai_specific.description: Native tracking of MTTD, MTTA, MTTT, MTTI, MTTR

ai_specific.name: Feedback Loop Mechanism
ai_specific.description: Analysts can confirm, reject, or correct AI decisions

ai_specific.name: Auto-Close Reversal Tracking
ai_specific.description: Tracks rate at which auto-closed alerts are reopened

ai_specific.name: Explainability / Decision Transparency
ai_specific.description: AI provides clear traceable reasoning for every decision

ai_specific.name: AI Decision Accuracy Reporting
ai_specific.description: Tracks TP accuracy, FP accuracy, and confidence scores

ai_specific.name: Model Drift Detection
ai_specific.description: Monitors AI model performance and alerts when accuracy degrades

ai_specific.name: Adversarial Robustness Testing
ai_specific.description: Supports or integrates with red team exercises to test AI resilience
